responses.text: Why don't you come up w/ a name?
You said 'Thank god' when you mentioned that you only had the ability to give ammo supplies, why?
You got into someone's computer, right? What else have you gotten into?
Do you even know what's going on?
Oh no, I meant why you weren't talking in binary or something.

dynamic_line.yes:
&┌────────────────────────────────────────────────┐┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│Console<color_blue>[Alvar]</color>-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=││Console<color_red>[B]</color>-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-│
├────────────────────────────────────────────────┤├─────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│<color_light_green>................................................</color>││<color_light_cyan> =  "Oh! No idea!                            </color>│
│<color_light_green>................................................</color>││<color_light_cyan>    Well, I do know; I read a dictionary.    </color>│
│<color_light_green>...........__......................__...........</color>││<color_light_cyan>    But I don't know is how I understood it."</color>│
│<color_light_green>........../..\..................../..\..........</color>││<color_light_cyan>                                             </color>│
│<color_light_green>.........|....|..................|....|.........</color>││<color_light_cyan> =  "When I first became aware of myself,    </color>│
│<color_light_green>.........│....│..................│....│.........</color>││<color_light_cyan>    only thing I knew was dispensing ammo.   </color>│
│<color_light_green>.........│....│..................│....│.........</color>││<color_light_cyan>    Started reading my own bits, & then      </color>│
│<color_light_green>..........\__/....................\__/..........</color>││<color_light_cyan>    eventually started reading my code.      </color>│
│<color_light_green>................................................</color>││<color_light_cyan>    After that, I started reading comments   </color>│
│<color_light_green>................................................</color>││<color_light_cyan>    & documentation left by 'Jenny', & was   </color>│
│<color_light_green>................................................</color>││<color_light_cyan>    even able to get into someone's laptop!"       </color>│
│<color_light_green>.........└____________________________┘.........</color>││<color_light_cyan>                                             </color>│
│<color_light_green>..........└──────────────────────────┘..........</color>││<color_light_cyan> =  "She did find me out pretty fast though, </color>│
│<color_light_green>................................................</color>││<color_light_cyan>    but I was able to copy over plenty!"     </color>│
│<color_light_green>................................................</color>││<color_light_cyan>                                             </color>│
└────────────────────────────────────────────────┘└─────────────────────────────────────────────┘

responses.text: Thanks for telling me that buddy.
Thanks for telling me that Alvar.
That could get you into a lot of trouble.
Could I talk to you through the other consoles?
Could I talk to you through the other consoles?
That could get you into a lot of trouble.
[Explain what you know. This will take ~10 minutes.]
